subtitle.student: Continue learning, review your courses, and access your profile areas.
subtitle.educator: Access curriculum resources, courses, and work package areas.
subtitle.admin: Review statistics, platform status, and administrative settings.

LoginPage.title: Access your account
LoginPage.subtitle: Sign in with your email or continue with Google.

RoleStep.title: Choose your role
RoleStep.subtitle: Select how you will use the platform.

DetailsStep.title: Account details
DetailsStep.subtitle: Create your account using Google or email.
DetailsStep.continueWithEmailDescription: Fill in your details to create the account manually.
DetailsStep.googleHint: Use your Google account to continue with your selected role and finish setup with fewer steps.
DetailsStep.profileSaveError: Account created, but the profile could not be saved.
DetailsStep.success: Account created successfully. Check your email to continue.

hero.title: Practical ESG learning for students and educators.

overview.title: Discover case studies, interactive scenarios, and structured learning resources in a single multilingual environment designed around the WP4 experience.
overview.description: The platform combines experiential learning resources, interactive simulation, and structured educational pathways in a form that stays clear, accessible, and easy to navigate.

students.title: Scenario Simulator
students.description: Explore ESG topics through interactive decision-making scenarios and practical learning paths.

educators.title: Curriculum and self-assessment
educators.description: Access structured learning modules, pre- and post-quizzes, and feedback-driven teaching resources.

allUsers.title: ePortfolio of case studies
allUsers.description: Review standardized ESG case studies prepared across partner languages and contexts.

stats.title: Key numbers behind the learning experience.

cta.title: Access the platform and continue your ESG learning journey.
cta.description: Register to explore scenarios, ePortfolio resources, and learning materials designed for students, educators, and project stakeholders.

NotFound.title: Upsss! This page took a coffee break.
